On this episode of the Tech Disruptors podcast, Onken joins Bloomberg Intelligence senior defense weapons analyst Wayne Sanders to discuss the speed, scaling and

summary: “It’s crazy to think that that would be the expectation in cancer care, yet we expect that of families in autism,” says Neil Hattangadi, CEO and co-founder of Cortica. He joins Bloomberg Intelligence analyst Jonathan Palmer to explain why autism care remains so fragmented and how Cortica is trying to replace siloed services with a coordinated whole-child model. They discuss why applied behavior analysis (ABA) should be one tool, not the whole answer, how Cortica integrates medical and behavioral

title_cn: 交易员称日本在“最终”警告后进行干预，日元飙升
summary: The yen surged as much as 3%, its biggest intraday gain in almost two years, as traders and local media said that Japan intervened in the foreign-exchange market, hours after officials delivered a “final” warning to investors against selling the currency.

title_cn: 由于石油价格上涨停滞，国债在抛售后吸引了买家

summary: European Central Bank policymakers are likely to raise interest rates at their next meeting in June unless there are positive developments on energy prices and ending the Iran war, according to people familiar with the situation.

title: The David Rubenstein Show: Charlie Scharf
title_cn: 大卫·鲁宾斯坦秀：查理·沙夫
summary: Wells Fargo Chairman & CEO Charlie Scharf says the independence of the Federal Reserve is "critically important" to the US financial system, even as presidents weigh in on policy. In this wide-ranging interview, Scharf discusses the state of US economy amid tensions with Iran, as well as the risks and opportunities in private credit and AI. Scharf is on this week's episode of "The David Rubenstein Show: Peer to Peer Conversations."  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Meta Gets $96 Billion of Orders for Its Latest Jumbo Bond Sale
title_cn: Meta 最新巨额债券发售获得 960 亿美元订单
summary: Investors submitted about $96 billion of orders for Meta Platforms Inc.’s bond sale, according to people with knowledge of the transaction, as the Facebook parent boosts spending on infrastructure for the artificial intelligence boom.

title: The Haves and Have Nots of AI
title_cn: 人工智能的富人和穷人
summary: The world’s already fracturing along technological fault lines.

title: Miami Mayor on Growth, World Cup, Wealth Influx
title_cn: 迈阿密市长谈经济增长、世界杯、财富涌入
summary: Eileen Higgins, Mayor, City of Miami discusses managing growth, investment inflows and long-term competitiveness with Bloomberg’s Daniel Cancel at Bloomberg House Miami 2026. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Banamex Selling Global Bonds for First Time Since Citi Sale
title_cn: 自花旗出售以来，Banamex 首次出售全球债券
summary: Mexico’s Grupo Financiero Banamex is tapping global markets for the first time since Citigroup Inc. started offloading its stake in the bank.

title: Audi F1 CEO Tries to Turn Also-Ran Legacy Team Into a Winner
title_cn: 奥迪F1首席执行官试图将落选的老车队变成胜利者
summary: Audi’s Formula 1 boss said entering the sport via a legacy team has proved more difficult than starting with a clean slate, as the German carmaker runs up against more established rivals.

title: Hospitals Sell Muni Debt at Fastest Pace in More Than a Decade
title_cn: 医院以十多年来最快的速度出售市政债务
summary: Hospitals across the country are bracing for financial pain ahead of sweeping Medicaid cuts from the Trump administration. But that hasn’t stopped them from borrowing at the fastest pace in more than a decade.

title: Pemex Posts Third Straight Loss Despite War-Fueled Oil Rally
title_cn: 尽管战争推动石油上涨，墨西哥国家石油公司仍连续第三次亏损
summary: Petroleos Mexicanos posted its third straight quarterly loss as surging global oil prices failed to boost the debt-laden oil giant’s finances amid slumping production and refineries that are bleeding cash.

title: US Stocks Rise on Earnings, on Course for Best Month Since 2020
title_cn: 美股因盈利上涨，有望创 2020 年以来最佳月份
summary: US stocks advanced on Thursday as investors focused on resilient US economic growth and corporate earnings while oil prices fell from a four-year high.

title: Junk Firms Are Locking In Fixed-Rate Deals Before Costs Rise
title_cn: 垃圾公司在成本上升之前锁定固定利率交易
summary: High-risk borrowers in Europe are taking advantage of cheaper fixed-rate bonds to refinance floating-rate debt, cutting costs and buying protection against the risk of interest rate hikes.

title: Copper Holds Steady as Traders Weigh Risk of Protracted Conflict
title_cn: 交易商权衡长期冲突风险，铜价保持稳定
summary: Copper held steady as signs of rising demand in China were offset by growing worries about the possibility of an escalation in the US-Israeli war against Iran.

title: New York Life Eyes Potential Canadian Dollar Debt Sale
title_cn: 纽约人寿着眼于潜在的加元债务出售
summary: New York Life Global Funding is weighing a Canadian-dollar debt offering as soon as Thursday, according to people familiar with the matter, who asked not to be identified as they aren’t authorized to speak publicly.

title: Taiwan's Cheng Li-wun Seeks Trump Meeting After Beijing Trip
title_cn: 台湾郑立文北京之行后寻求与特朗普会面
summary: Cheng Li-wun discusses her hope to meet President Trump following her Beijing visit, aiming to convey Taiwan's commitment to avoiding conflict and securing lasting cross-strait peace. (Includes partial English translation from :35.) (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Audi on Building Its Formula 1 Team
title_cn: 奥迪致力于打造一级方程式车队
summary: Mattia Binotto, CEO & Team Principal, Audi Revolut F1 Team discusses building a fully integrated Formula 1 team and evolving Sauber with Bloomberg’s Matt Miller at Bloomberg House Miami 2026. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Jana Pushes Markel to Divest Ventures, Buy Back $2 Billion Shares
title_cn: Jana 推动 Markel 剥离风险投资公司并回购价值 20 亿美元的股票
summary: Jana Partners is renewing its push for Markel Group Inc. to divest its venture arm while pushing the insurer to also buy back $2 billion of its shares to boost the stock.

title: Bank of England Holds Rates as Officials Consider Hikes Ahead
title_cn: 英格兰银行维持利率不变，官员考虑未来加息
summary: The Bank of England kept interest rates on hold with several policymakers saying they might consider future hikes, just as oil prices soared within reach of the central bank’s most pessimistic scenario for the economy.

title: European Power Plunges to Record Negative Prices on Solar Surge
title_cn: 太阳能激增导致欧洲电力价格暴跌至负价
summary: European power prices slid to record lows for Friday, with hugely negative hourly rates in Germany and France, as strong solar generation coincides with public holidays across much of the region.

title: Stocks Edge Higher as Oil Prices Ease; JPMorgan 's Meera Pandit
title_cn: 随着油价下跌，股市小幅走高；摩根大通的米拉·潘迪特
summary: Mira Pandit of JPMorgan Asset Management discussed the current earnings outlook amid easing oil prices and ongoing geopolitical tensions. Despite oil pulling back from wartime highs, JPMorgan analysts project that oil prices between $110 and $120 per barrel over six months could reduce earnings per share by 4 to 6%, yet still support double-digit earnings growth overall. Earnings growth expectations have been revised upward from 15% to nearly 19% year-over-year, driven primarily by energy and resilient technology sectors. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Retraces From Four-Year High as War Fears Dampen Liquidity
title_cn: 由于战争担忧抑制流动性，油价从四年高点回落
summary: Brent crude cooled off after ripping to a four-year high on anticipation of a protracted US war with Iran, in a session marked by machine-led trading and thin volumes.

title: Bloomberg Surveillance 4/30/2026
title_cn: 彭博社监测 2026 年 4 月 30 日
summary: Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern speak daily with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond. No other program better positions investors and executives for the trading day. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gold Rebounds as Speculation of Yen Intervention Weakens Dollar
title_cn: 日元干预猜测削弱美元，金价反弹
summary: Gold bounced back from a three-day decline, as the dollar sank and traders weighed the prospect of a fresh US military engagement in Iran.

title: Meta Shares Plunge on Rising Concerns About AI Spending Spree
title_cn: 由于对人工智能支出热潮的担忧加剧，Meta 股价暴跌
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. shares plunged by the most in six months after the company raised its spending outlook for the year, reigniting fears that the historic levels of investment that Chief Executive Officer Mark Zuckerberg is making to catch up in the artificial intelligence race won’t pay off.

title: Musk Says No Written Agreement for His Early Donation to OpenAI
title_cn: 马斯克表示，他对 OpenAI 的早期捐赠没有书面协议
summary: Elon Musk acknowledged there was no written agreement or contract with OpenAI regarding the terms of his donation to the company when it was first founded as a nonprofit research organization more than a decade ago.

title: Why Anthropic’s Mythos Is Sparking Global Alarm
title_cn: 为什么 Anthropic 的神话引发全球警报
summary: Anthropic PBC has said its new artificial intelligence tool, Mythos, is so good at finding vulnerabilities in software and computer systems that it can’t be released to the general public. The AI giant released Mythos to a limited number of carefully chosen parties because if a tool this powerful fell into the wrong hands, Anthropic says, it could help attackers more easily steal data or disrupt critical infrastructure.

title: AI Boom Boosts US Economy, Offering Way to Blunt War Impact
title_cn: 人工智能繁荣提振美国经济，为削弱战争影响提供途径
summary: The AI growth engine was on full display in the first quarter, powering the US economy through fresh headwinds from a war-driven surge in inflation.

title: OpenAI, Meta Targeted in AI Child Safety Bill Senate Panel Backs
title_cn: OpenAI、Meta 成为人工智能儿童安全法案参议院小组支持的目标
summary: A powerful Senate committee backed legislation to require OpenAI, Meta Platforms Inc. and other artificial intelligence companies to stop minors from using chatbots, responding to a strengthening public backlash against harm to children and teenagers attributed to the fast-spreading technology.

title: Euro-Area Finance Chiefs to Discuss Mythos as Concerns Mount
title_cn: 随着担忧加剧，欧元区财长将讨论神话
summary: Euro-area finance ministers will discuss the challenges that Anthropic PBC’s Mythos AI model poses as officials struggle to get clarity on the new tool’s powers.

title: White House AI Memo Hits Issues in Anthropic-Pentagon Feud
title_cn: 白宫人工智能备忘录触及人类与五角大楼不和的问题
summary: White House officials are preparing a wide-ranging artificial intelligence policy memo that outlines requirements for AI deployment by national security agencies, some of which address the issues driving a bitter dispute between the Pentagon and Anthropic PBC over military use of the firm’s technology, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Orlando Bravo on Private Markets, AI
title_cn: Orlando Bravo 谈私人市场、人工智能
summary: Orlando Bravo, Founder & Managing Partner, Thoma Bravo discusses private market strategy and AI-driven value shifts with Bloomberg’s Dani Burger at Bloomberg House Miami 2026. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BlackRock COO on How AI Is Fueling the Firm’s Product Innovation
title_cn: 贝莱德首席运营官谈人工智能如何推动公司产品创新
summary: On this episode of the Odd Lots podcast, BlackRock COO Rob Goldstein joins Joe Weisenthal and Tracy Alloway to discuss ways in which the firm is already using AI to develop innovative products, as well as how he envisions the future of private markets. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Orlando Bravo Says Thoma Bravo Has Become AI-Centric
title_cn: Orlando Bravo 表示 Thoma Bravo 已以人工智能为中心
summary: "We have had to make our companies, very, very quickly, AI-centric companies," Thoma Bravo founder and Managing Partner Orlando Bravo says during an interview with Dani Burger at Bloomberg Miami House. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Hallucinations Put South African Ministers on the Spot
title_cn: 人工智能幻觉让南非部长陷入困境
summary: South Africa’s Democratic Alliance party has extolled the need to adopt modern technology to boost government efficiency since joining the ruling coalition as the second-biggest party in 2024.

title: EU Chips Act Overhaul Aims to Boost Investment
title_cn: 欧盟芯片法案改革旨在促进投资
summary: The European Union’s revamped plans to stimulate the semiconductor industry — a crucial part of the supply chain for everything from artificial intelligence to cars — would allow the bloc’s executive arm to invest directly in manufacturing and would prioritize development of new technologies, people familiar with the draft said.

title: Citadel’s Rubner Sees Tech Selloff as Buying Opportunity
title_cn: Citadel 的鲁布纳将科技股抛售视为买入机会
summary: Scott Rubner, head of equity and equity derivatives strategy at Citadel Securities, says he is not seeing a decline in AI spending and demand. He discusses the buying opportunity he sees in US megacap tech stocks and why he’s bullish on consumer trading. Rubner speaks with Dani Burger on the sidelines of Bloomberg House Miami. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: NSA Testing Anthropic’s Mythos to Find Flaws in Microsoft Tech
title_cn: NSA 测试 Anthropic 的神话以寻找微软技术中的缺陷
summary: The National Security Agency has been testing the capabilities of Anthropic PBC’s new artificial intelligence model to find cybersecurity vulnerabilities in popular software, including Microsoft Corp. products, according to a US official and another person familiar with the matter.

title: Humanoid Maker 1X Opens New US Factory, Plans to Build 10,000 Home Robots in First Year
title_cn: Humanoid Maker 1X 在美国开设新工厂，计划第一年生产 10,000 台家用机器人
summary: 1X Technologies AS, the Norway-founded robotics startup backed by OpenAI, has opened a new 58,000-square-foot factory in Hayward, California, where it aims to be one of the first players to build humanoids for consumers at scale.

title: Alphabet Soars After Strong Sales Signal AI Bets Are Paying Off
title_cn: 强劲的销售信号表明人工智能押注正在获得回报，Alphabet 股价飙升
summary: Alphabet Inc. shares soared by the most in nearly eight months after the company reported strong demand for its cloud and artificial intelligence offerings, signaling that its unprecedented investments in AI infrastructure are paying off.

title: Alphabet, Amazon Outpace Meta in AI During Earnings Bonanza
title_cn: Alphabet、亚马逊在人工智能领域的盈利丰厚，超过了 Meta
summary: A frenzied day of earnings reports offered a glimpse at how some of the world’s biggest tech companies are doing in artificial intelligence. The upshot: Alphabet Inc.’s Google is seeing a clear payoff from its AI spending, while Meta Platforms Inc. is lagging behind.

title: Apple Earnings Become Sideshow With New CEO Ready to Grab Reins
title_cn: 苹果财报成为杂耍，新任首席执行官准备掌权
summary: Apple Inc. reports quarterly earnings after the close on Thursday, but investors will be largely looking past the numbers and seeking clues to incoming Chief Executive Officer John Ternus’ strategic plans.

title: Polymarket Adds New Detection Tools After Insider Bet Backlash
title_cn: 在内幕押注强烈反对后，Polymarket 增加了新的检测工具
summary: Polymarket is partnering with blockchain analytics firm Chainalysis Inc. to help police its platform as prediction markets grapple with increased scrutiny over insider trading.

title: Iran Internet Blackout Tightens Military’s Grip on Civilian Life
title_cn: 伊朗互联网封锁加强了军方对平民生活的控制
summary: Iran’s record internet blackout is emerging as a key dividing line between the country’s powerful security apparatus and its civilian government, underlining how the war with the US has extended the military’s control over daily life.

title: Qualcomm Bids for a Share of the Massive Spending on AI Chips
title_cn: 高通竞购人工智能芯片巨额支出的份额
summary: The top maker of chips for smartphones wants in on the explosive AI data center market.

title: SpaceX Investor 137 Raises $700 Million Ahead of Musk-Led IPO
title_cn: SpaceX Investor 137 在马斯克主导的 IPO 之前筹集了 7 亿美元
summary: 137 Ventures, a repeat investor in Elon Musk’s SpaceX, has raised $700 million across two new funds to back startups over longer time horizons.

title: Equities Insulated by Earnings in the Near Term, Says Evercore’s Emanuel
title_cn: Evercore 的伊曼纽尔表示，短期内股市不受盈利影响
summary: Julian Emanuel, chief equity and quantitative strategist at Evercore, examines the role of earnings in supporting the bull market in stocks and offers a timeframe for when higher oil prices will begin to impact equities. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Foundering: Bob Lee’s Made-for-TV Murder Trial
title_cn: 创始人：鲍勃·李为电视制作的谋杀案审判
summary: The trial for Bob Lee’s murder became a media circus, including paparazzi photographers, celebrity attorneys, obstinate witnesses, testimony about drug-fueled parties, and secret videos.

title: Delta Electronics Plans Rapid Expansion as AI Fuels Growth
title_cn: 台达电子计划因人工智能推动增长而快速扩张
summary: Delta Electronics Inc. plans to accelerate plant expansions to address production bottlenecks after surging demand for artificial intelligence data centers drove first-quarter earnings to a record.

title: The Messy Reality of AI’s Much Discussed Gender Gap
title_cn: 人工智能备受争议的性别差距的混乱现实
summary: Women are using artificial intelligence at lower rates than men. But are they being “left behind”?

title: Two US Senators Seek Cantor Loan Documents From Lutnick and Tether
title_cn: 两名美国参议员向 Lutnick 和 Tether 寻求 Cantor 贷款文件
summary: Two Democratic senators have asked US Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick and the cryptocurrency giant Tether for information about a loan between the company and a trust benefitting Lutnick’s children.

title: Murata’s Shares Jump After Giving Upbeat Forecast for AI Demand
title_cn: 村田制作所对人工智能需求做出乐观预测后股价上涨
summary: Murata Manufacturing Co.‘s shares jumped after the component maker reported stronger-than-expected quarterly earnings and gave an upbeat forecast on the back of the AI investment boom.

title: CATL’s $5 Billion Placement Paves Way for Hong Kong Deals After Wartime Disruption
title_cn: CATL 50 亿美元配售为战时中断后的香港交易铺平道路
summary: A $5 billion placement by battery giant Contemporary Amperex Technology Co. Ltd. is setting the stage for a fresh wave of share sales in Hong Kong after volatility triggered by the war in Iran weighed on the deal flow.

title: Starmer Vows ‘Full Power of State’ to Fight Antisemitism
title_cn: 斯塔默誓言“国家全力”打击反犹太主义
summary: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer pledged to use the “full power of the state” to crack down on antisemitism, after a stabbing in north London raised fresh questions about the government’s attention to threats against Britain’s Jewish community.

title: Trump Nominates Saphier for Surgeon General After Pulling Means
title_cn: 特朗普在筹集资金后提名萨菲尔为卫生局局长
summary: President Donald Trump pulled the nomination of wellness entrepreneur Casey Means to be US surgeon general and named Nicole Saphier, a radiologist, to replace her.

title: White House Press Dinner Shooting Suspect to Face More Charges, Pirro Says
title_cn: 皮罗称，白宫新闻晚宴枪击案嫌疑人将面临更多指控
summary: The US Attorney for the District of Columbia, Jeanine Pirro, said she will issue more charges against the man accused of trying to assassinate President Donald Trump at a press dinner gala over the weekend.

title: Pakistani Fuel Tanker Attempts Hormuz Exit Amid Gulf Gridlock
title_cn: 巴基斯坦油轮在海湾僵局中试图离开霍尔木兹
summary: A Pakistani tanker carrying a cargo of diesel from Kuwait appeared to be making an outbound transit through the Strait of Hormuz, a rare event in the blockaded waterway.

title: FDA Panel Votes Against Benefit of Astra’s Breast Cancer Drug
title_cn: FDA 小组投票反对 Astra 乳腺癌药物的益处
summary: AstraZeneca Plc failed to persuade a US regulatory review panel about the benefits of its novel breast cancer medicine, throwing a hurdle in front of a key drug in the company’s pipeline.

title: Democratic Maine Governor Mills Drops Out of Key Senate Race
title_cn: 民主党缅因州州长米尔斯退出关键的参议院竞选
summary: Maine Governor Janet Mills suspended her campaign for a US Senate seat on Thursday, upending the race to unseat incumbent Republican Senator Susan Collins.

title: Russia Increases Reliance on China for Critical War Supplies
title_cn: 俄罗斯增加对中国关键战争物资的依赖
summary: Russia is importing more than 90% of its sanctioned technology through China, a sign of Moscow’s growing reliance on Beijing as Vladimir Putin’s war against Ukraine drags on.

title: US Seeks to Deploy Hypersonic Missile for the First Time Against Iran
title_cn: 美国寻求首次针对伊朗部署高超音速导弹
summary:
The US is seeking to deploy its hypersonic missile for the first time, for possible use against Iran.

Gerry Doyle explains what Dark Eagle is — and why Russia and China are watching. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: EU Rejects US Plan to End Metals Tariff Spat and Mulls Response
title_cn: 欧盟拒绝美国结束金属关税争端的计划并考虑回应
summary: The European Union’s biggest economies are unhappy with a US proposal to resolve a metals tariff dispute, injecting fresh uncertainty into final negotiations to implement a stalled trade deal.

title: Taiwan Opposition Leader Eyes Trump Meeting After Xi Sitdown
title_cn: 习近平坐下后，台湾反对党领袖关注特朗普会面
summary: The head of Taiwan’s main opposition party said she has asked to meet with President Donald Trump on a planned trip to the US, casting herself as a leader who could prevent a conflict with China through dialogue with the world’s largest economies.

title: Chinese Officials Speak to Bessent, Rubio About Taiwan, Trade
title_cn: 中国官员与贝森特和卢比奥讨论台湾和贸易问题
summary: Secretary of State Marco Rubio spoke with his Chinese counterpart Wang Yi about the Iran war and an upcoming leaders’ summit between Donald Trump and Xi Jinping, China’s state Xinhua News Agency reported on Thursday.

title: Mexican Governor’s Indictment in US Puts Claudia Sheinbaum in a Bind
title_cn: 墨西哥州长在美国的起诉使克劳迪娅·辛鲍姆陷入困境
summary: Less than two years into a presidency rocked by Donald Trump’s unpredictable moves, Mexican leader Claudia Sheinbaum is facing her toughest choice yet in relations with the US.

title: Hegseth Causes ‘Lasting Harm’ to Military, Top Democrat Says
title_cn: 民主党高层称赫格斯对军队造成“持久伤害”
summary: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth is “causing lasting harm to the military,” the Senate Armed Services Committee’s top Democrat said as the panel hosted the Pentagon chief for a second day of Congressional testimony.

title: Ukraine Strikes on Russian Oil Assets Climb to Four-Month High
title_cn: 乌克兰对俄罗斯石油资产的打击升至四个月最高点
summary: Ukraine’s attacks on Russian oil infrastructure climbed to the highest monthly level since December, cutting the neighboring nation’s refinery runs to multi-year lows.

title: Trump Family-Backed Drone Firm Signs Weapons Deal With US
title_cn: 特朗普家族支持的无人机公司与美国签署武器协议
summary: The US Air Force agreed to buy an undisclosed number of interceptor drones from a company backed by President Donald Trump’s sons, according to the firm, deepening the military’s ties to defense contractors linked to the first family as the US war with Iran enters its third month.

title: BOE's Bailey Says Market Reaction to Rates Decision Is 'Sensible'
title_cn: 英国央行贝利表示市场对利率决定的反应是“明智的”
summary: Bank of England Governor Andrew Bailey said the market reaction to the central bank's decision to keep interest rates unchanged has been "very sensible," adding that recent UK market moves have so far been "dominated" by the situation in the Middle East, rather than internal political developments. He was speaking in an interview with Bloomberg's Francine Lacqua.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Only Iran-Linked Traffic Moves Through Hormuz Amid Blockades
title_cn: 在封锁期间，只有与伊朗有关的交通才能通过霍尔木兹
summary: A few Iran-linked vessels are making their way through the Strait of Hormuz, as the crucial waterway remains effectively closed to most international shipping amid blockades by both Tehran and the US.

title: Lagarde Says She Knows Where ECB Is Headed on Rates
title_cn: 拉加德表示她知道欧洲央行利率走向
summary: European Central Bank President Christine Lagarde said she knows where, directionally, the central bank is headed. She also added the ramp-up in oil and natural gas costs is not yet triggering so-called "second-round effects." Lagarde was speaking to reporters at a press conference following the ECB's decision to keep rates unchanged. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: American Flight Heads to Caracas as Commercial Flights to Venezuela Resume
title_cn: 随着飞往委内瑞拉的商业航班恢复，美国航班飞往加拉加斯
summary: American Airlines Group Inc. resumed flights to Venezuela after a seven-year hiatus, as President Donald Trump pushes to restore commercial and diplomatic ties after ordering the capture of President Nicolas Maduro.

title: Hassett on Powell Staying at Fed, Inflation and Oil Spike
title_cn: 哈塞特谈鲍威尔留在美联储、通胀和石油飙升
summary: National Economic Council Director Kevin Hassett says productivity gains should help keep core prices under control and it would be a mistake for the Federal Reserve and ECB to hike rates during what he sees as a temporary oil shock. Speaking on "Bloomberg Surveillance," Hassett also weighs in on Fed Chair Jerome Powell's plans to stay on at the central bank once his term as chairman ends. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Seeks Delays in Jan. 6 Civil Suits During Immunity Appeal
title_cn: 特朗普寻求在豁免上诉期间推迟 1 月 6 日民事诉讼
summary: Police officers and Democratic lawmakers suing to hold Donald Trump liable for violent riots at the US Capitol more than five years ago face a new round of delays as the president continues to press for immunity against their claims.

title: How the US Supreme Court Gutted the Voting Rights Act
title_cn: 美国最高法院如何废除投票权法案
summary: Two conservative ideas are behind the Supreme Court’s decision to gut the Voting Rights Act. Bloomberg Opinion columnist and Harvard Law professor Noah Feldman explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: NEC's Hassett Says a Rate Hike Would Be a Mistake Right Now
title_cn: NEC 的哈塞​​特表示，现在加息将是一个错误
summary: National Economic Council Director Kevin Hassett says productivity gains will help keep core prices under control during an interview on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Lagarde Joins Powell in Rejecting Stagflation Label of 1970s
title_cn: 拉加德与鲍威尔一起拒绝 20 世纪 70 年代的滞胀标签
summary: European Central Bank President Christine Lagarde said stagflation is a label that belongs to the 1970s and shouldn’t be used to describe the current predicament of the euro zone.

title: How North Korea Is Supporting Putin’s War in Ukraine
title_cn: 朝鲜如何支持普京的乌克兰战争
summary: Russia’s war in Ukraine might have taken a different turn without the involvement of North Korea. The weaponry and troops provided by Kim Jong Un’s regime have supported the yearslong bombardment of Ukrainian towns and cities, and also helped repel a surprise Ukrainian incursion into Russian territory in 2024.

title: Lagarde Says ECB Debated Options Including Rate Hike
title_cn: 拉加德称欧洲央行正在讨论包括加息在内的选项
summary: European Central Bank President Christine Lagarde says the euro-area economy is “certainly moving away” from the ECB’s baseline scenario, and that policymakers discussed options including a possible rate hike during meetings in Frankfurt. She made the comments at a news conference after officials left the deposit rate at 2%, where it’s been since June 2025.

title: ECB’s Lagarde Says Economic Outlook ‘Highly Uncertain’
title_cn: 欧洲央行行长拉加德称经济前景“高度不确定”
summary: European Central Bank President Christine Lagarde said the euro-area economic outlook is “highly uncertain” and will depend on how the war in the Middle East, and its impact on global supply chains, unfolds. Lagarde was speaking to reporters at a press conference following the ECB’s decision to keep interest rates unchanged.
